content:
A 'rug' takes your money without giving you anything of value in return. Doing your own research into an art collection can save you lost eth on worthless art from rugged projects.

Watch 'DYOR in 60 Seconds' on the MintFace Skills Portal and gain confidence in finding legit art by legit artists.

  1. Find the correct art collection on OpenSea
  2. Avoid common yellow flags with fake collections
  3. View who the art buyers and owners are
  4. Review who the art contract owner is
  5. Check if the Bored Ape of the Twitter handle touting the art is legit
  6. Check eth flows in and out of the contract
  7. Check the contract code
